narrative:
Union County has 48,631 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 28.3% of registrants.
